per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've been sweating pretty heavily during these episodes.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: No, actually I do sweat a lot during the episodes.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does it radiate anywhere — like your arms, neck, or jaw?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I do feel a numbness or tingling sensation in my left arm during the more severe episodes. It's not always there, but when it is, it can be pretty uncomfortable.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any tingling or numbness in your arms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Only when the episodes are more severe. The tingling sensation in my left arm usually shows up then.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: What about your extremities — any tingling, pain, or unusual sensations?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I don't think so. Like I said, I get some numbness and tingling in my left arm when it's bad, but other than that, no other symptoms in my arms or legs.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere? Ankles, feet, hands?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yeah, I've had some mild ankle swelling lately. My shoes feel a bit tighter than usual, but it's not too bad.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do your shoes feel tighter than usual, or any puffiness in your legs?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My shoes do feel a bit tighter than usual due to the ankle swelling.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you feel sick to your stomach when the symptoms come on?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: It seems like we're getting into more details about my symptoms. To answer your question directly, I've been feeling a bit queasy during some of these episodes.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any medical problems in your family? Parents, siblings?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mom has been dealing with high blood pressure and diabetes for years - she's 78 and still doing well. My dad... he had a heart attack when he was 52.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response:
My father passed away from a heart attack at age 52. It's been on my mind lately with what I'm experiencing."
